summary: Fair‑quality recording of an otherwise generic show, highlighted by a memorable “Spanish Theme” jam and Mickey’s brass‑bowl drumming.
review: The reviewer attended the concert and describes it as largely routine except for the standout “Spanish Theme,” which they even use as a phone‑answering background. No specific comments are made about the audio fidelity, so the recording quality can only be judged as average. Overall sentiment is mixed – the show isn’t terrible but offers few unique moments beyond the noted jam and quirky drum work.

ai_rating.rationale: Only one detailed review; it rates the performance as average with a single highlight and gives no clear assessment of sound quality, leading to a modest overall rating.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Reviewer does not discuss clarity, mix or source type, so recording quality cannot be firmly judged.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Described as a fairly generic set with the exception of the “Spanish Theme” jam and an unusual drumming texture from Mickey.

band_member_comments.Drums: Mickey’s use of brass bowls is specifically noted as a memorable moment.
